mapper.sql: id AS id, user_id AS userId, bank_code AS bankCode, mock_account_number AS mockAccountNumber, balance AS balance, available_amount AS availableAmount, status AS status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM mock_bank_accounts WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM mock_bank_accounts WHERE id = #{accountId} FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE mock_bank_accounts SET balance = balance - #{amount}, available_amount = available_amount - #{amount}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{accountId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND available_amount >= #{amount}
UPDATE mock_bank_accounts SET balance = balance + #{amount}, available_amount = available_amount + #{amount}, updated_at = NOW(6) WHERE id = #{accountId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mock_bank_transactions (account_id, bank_tran_id, transfer_type, amount, balance_before, balance_after, reference_type, reference_id, status) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{bankTranId}, #{transferType}, #{amount}, #{balanceBefore}, #{balanceAfter}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, 'SUCCESS')
